\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5680 introduces Differential Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{D}(\mathrm{TZP}) := \lim_{t \rightarrow 0} \frac{\nabla \Phi(x, t)}{\partial \Omega^{\mathbb{T}}(x, t)}\\ \textbf{01.} $
\]
